dialogueItems.name: Tutorial
dialogueItems.text: Use <sprite="KeyboardAndMouseSprites/W_Key_Dark" name="W_Key_Dark"><sprite="KeyboardAndMouseSprites/A_Key_Dark" name="A_Key_Dark"><sprite="KeyboardAndMouseSprites/S_Key_Dark" name="S_Key_Dark"><sprite="KeyboardAndMouseSprites/D_Key_Dark" name="D_Key_Dark"> to move and <sprite="KeyboardAndMouseSprites/Mouse_Simple_Key_Dark" name="Mouse_Simple_Key_Dark"> to rotate the camera
